data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed artifact branch `codex/2475-beat-state-overview` at commit fd6b433688e15fad445879131119474ec62b05c8 against `origin/main`. The diff matches the knot acceptance criteria: `/beats?view=overview` renders state-grouped visible beats exactly once, shows counts and compact summaries, reuses the existing detail lightbox, preserves the existing views, avoids drag/drop kanban behavior, and excludes internal lease records from the overview surface. Sanity gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Browser verification passed on desktop and mobile with no page-width overflow.
